capabilities.description: Run the 4-agent pipeline (Classifier-Analyzer-Investigator-Advisor) on a legal document to identify risks and provide advice
Answer questions about Italian/EU legislation using the Corpus Agent with RAG over 5600+ legal articles
Optimize agent prompts for accuracy, token efficiency, and output quality
Review marketing or public-facing content for legal accuracy before publication
Configure agent models, fallback chains, and tier settings in lib/tiers.ts and lib/models.ts

skills.description: Run just the Classifier agent on a document text to identify type, sub-type, and relevant legal institutes

parameters.name: documentText
parameters.description: Extracted text from the document to classify

skills.returns: { type: string, subType: string, institutes: string[], focusAreas: string[] }

skills.description: Verify pipeline health: tier configuration, model availability, fallback chain status
skills.returns: { tier: string, agents: Array<{ name: string, enabled: boolean, model: string }>, fallbackChains: object }
